violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Ceviche is served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Inspector observed linen/cloth being used to cover tortillas. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The establishment is lacking a waste disposal unit. Per interview with PIC, will be delivered today. PIC to send inspector proof. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The hoods in the kitchen area have a HEAVY accumulation of soil residue and grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
A spoon and rag were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives, bowls, plates, spatula) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Chicken wings were observed held at 109 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Ceviche is served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection, chicken was cooling in prep area in a COVERED bowl. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large and small droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Inspector observed linen/cloth being used to cover tortillas. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the back kitchen area. Inspector observed droppings in single use items (back kitchen area). See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1) Shelving throughout entire front kitchen (droppings & food residue) 2) Steam Table Ledge (droppings) 3) Ware washing shelving (debris) New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The mop sink had equipment and unused items. PIC informed that mop sinks must be accessible. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The refuse area has a HEAVY accumulation of trash, litter, and unused equipment. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The establishment is lacking a waste disposal unit. Per interview with PIC, will be delivered tomorrow. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the refuse area & back kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The hoods in the kitchen area has an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Bathroom handwashing sink is lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted to notify food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Wood is used in the construction of platform for prep table in the back kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Technician was on site for plumbing during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside and back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024
